creator: wayne@staff.msen.com
text:
Amanda uses gmake during build but does not create it if required.
Frequent problem on client machines which have minimal ports installed.

===>   Returning to build of amanda24-client-2.4.2p2_1
env: gmake: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/misc/amanda24-client.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: Build amanda24-client on machine w/o gmake
